## Question

What benchmark, score, evidence lane, or comparability claim are you asking about?

## Context

Link to the relevant doc, schema, catalog entry, or result bundle shape.

## Concern

What might be misleading, incomplete, too expensive, or hard to reproduce?

## Suggested change

If you have a proposed fix, describe it here.

Do not attach private benchmark inputs, private run artifacts, tokens, or credentials.
